ksa_text: Knowledge of model risk management regulatory expectations, including SR 11-7, SS1/23, and EU AI Act requirements as they apply to AI and ML models in regulated industries, including effective challenge, validation, and ongoing monitoring obligations.

ddat.top_element_label: Capability building for digital, data and technology

nist_ai_rmf.top_element_label: Policies, processes, procedures, and practices across the organization related to the mapping, measuring, and managing of AI risks are in place, transparent, and implemented effectively.

pass_2_evaluation.rationale: Included: knowledge maps directly to AI Auditor scope — RSK-specific signals detected ("risk manag", "model risk", "sr.?11.?7"). STRM composite is strong (0.4927); note that framework scores routinely underweight risk management and governance vocabulary, so text-based signal carries primary weight here. Seniority is appropriate: the KSA describes practice-level execution, not enterprise strategy.
